alerts.headline: Freeze Watch issued April 15 at 12:06AM PDT until April 17 at 8:00AM PDT by NWS Reno NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Sub-freezing temperatures with lows 26 to 30 degrees Friday
morning. Outside of urban areas, sub-freezing temperatures with
lows 20 to 25 degrees.

* WHERE...Greater Reno-Carson City-Minden Area.

* WHEN...From Thursday evening through Friday morning.

* IMPACTS...Frost and freeze conditions could kill crops, other
sensitive vegetation and possibly damage unprotected outdoor
plumbing.
alerts.instruction:
Take steps now to protect tender plants from the cold.

To prevent water pipes from freezing; wrap or drain or allow them to
drip slowly.
